parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'orphan_briefings',         (SELECT count(*) FROM briefings b           WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = b.project_id)),
  'orphan_design_options',    (SELECT count(*) FROM design_options d      WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = d.project_id)),
  'orphan_regulatory_tasks',  (SELECT count(*) FROM regulatory_tasks rt   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = rt.project_id)),
  'orphan_cost_estimates',    (SELECT count(*) FROM cost_estimates ce     WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = ce.project_id)),
  'orphan_proposals',         (SELECT count(*) FROM proposals pr          WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = pr.project_id)),
  'orphan_invoices',          (SELECT count(*) FROM invoices i            WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = i.project_id)),
  'orphan_aftercare',         (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents a WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = a.project_id)),
  'orphan_consent_records',   (SELECT count(*) FROM consent_records cr    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clients c  WHERE c.id = cr.client_id)),
  'orphan_client_tokens',     (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clients c  WHERE c.id = t.client_id)),
  'orphan_conversations',     (SELECT count(*) FROM client_conversations cc WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = cc.project_id)),
  'projects_without_client',  (SELECT count(*) FROM projects p             WHERE p.client_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clients c WHERE c.id = p.client_id)),
  'clients_without_consent',  (SELECT count(*) FROM clients c              WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM consent_records cr WHERE cr.client_id = c.id AND cr.revoked_at IS NULL)),
  'projects_invalid_phase',   (SELECT count(*) FROM projects p             WHERE p.current_phase NOT IN ('intake','briefing_done','design_done','analysis_done','costs_done','trades_done','proposal_done','approved','planning_done','completed','archived')),
  'tokens_invalid_purpose',   (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens t WHERE t.purpose NOT IN ('project_view','client_ask','aftercare_submit','gdpr_request','full_access')),
  'briefings_no_project_ref', (SELECT count(*) FROM briefings b            WHERE b.project_id IS NULL)
) AS report;

SELECT raise_security_event(
  'unusual_access_pattern'::text,
  CASE WHEN $1::int > 50 THEN 'high' ELSE 'medium' END,
  'cron'::text, '/cron_data_integrity'::text, 'data_integrity'::text, NULL::uuid,
  'Data integrity check: ' || $1 || ' filas con problema (orphans, FKs sueltas, fases invalidas).',
  $2::jsonb
) AS event_id;
INSERT INTO activity_log (action, agent_name, details) VALUES ('data_integrity_ok', 'cron_data_integrity', $1::jsonb);
